courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Memory and Reconstruction Game
genericDescription: Represent memory as incomplete system; design reconstruction through action; communicate uncertainty.
specificDescription: Build a game where players reconstruct an event, place, artwork, dataset, or relationship from fragments. Include at least one ambiguity that remains meaningfully unresolved.
gradingRubric: 30 pts reconstruction mechanics; 20 pts productive ambiguity; 20 pts track application; 15 pts player guidance; 15 pts notes.
